payload.title: 2024 Annual Operating Report
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad 2024 annual operating performance report covering on-time performance, delays, cancellations, MDBF, elevator and escalator availability

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.
